session_start.description: Load project context at session start

actions.message: Session started. CLAUDE.md loaded. Use /plan, /tdd, /code-review, or /security-scan for workflows. Agents run in separate context windows.
Pre-commit: Verify no hardcoded secrets, debug statements, or console.logs in staged files.

tips: Use agents for complex reviews — they run in separate context windows
Skills load only when invoked — they don't cost tokens until needed
Keep CLAUDE.md under 100 lines — it loads every turn
For long sessions, summarize findings periodically to free context
